summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Reclaim Africa claim submission portal. Backend APIs are working well (9/10 tests passed). Frontend user flows are fully functional including registration, login, multi-step claim form, and dashboard. Admin login works but admin panel has display issues. Email notifications are configured but API key needs updating.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 422 validation error instead of 401 unauthorized when called without auth
flaky_endpoints.impact: Minor - FastAPI validates request body before checking auth

configuration_issues.impact: Email notifications fail but are logged

ui_bugs.issue: Claims table not displaying despite successful API calls

integration_issues.issue: Admin panel loads but claims table is not rendered

navigation_issues.issue: Help Center navigation link not working consistently

passed_tests: User registration with email validation and cookie setting
Admin login with correct role-based redirect
Multi-step claim form (5 steps) with progress bar
Claim creation and submission with confirmation
Claim status updates via admin API

high_priority: Fix admin panel claims table display issue - API returns data but table not rendering
Update RESEND_API_KEY with valid API key for email notifications
low_priority: Consider returning 401 before validation for unauthorized API calls

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (core flows work, admin panel display issue)
success_percentage.integration: 80% (user flows complete, admin panel needs fix)
